items.title: Si Grass looks to enhance her profile at Southwell
items.summary: We have a busy day’s racing on Wednesday with action from Hereford and Southwell, live on Sky Sports Racing...

items.title: Frank onder vuur: 'Dramatische tijden vragen om dramatische ingrepen'
items.summary: De positie van Thomas Frank als manager van Tottenham Hotspur staat na de thuisnederlaag tegen Newcastle United nog meer onder druk. De Deen werd dinsdagavond uitgejouwd door het thuispubliek en analytici verwachten dat de clubleiding op korte termijn gaat ingrijpen.

items.title: De Zerbi leaves Marseille by mutual consent
items.summary: Roberto de Zerbi, who led Marseille to second in Ligue 1 last season, leaves following their Champions League exit and a 5-0 defeat by Paris St-Germain.

items.title: Transfers Ajax: te weinig spelers hebben Ajax naar een hoger niveau getild
items.summary: VI volgt het transfernieuws bij Ajax op de voet, ook nu de winterse transferwindow gesloten is. De doelwitten van de Amsterdammers, duiding van de clubwatcher, of aandacht in buitenlandse media. We verzamelen alles hier.

items.title: 'Ook technisch directeur moet het veld ruimen bij Marseille'
items.summary: We zitten in een periode tussen twee transferwindows, maar de stroom aan transfernieuws houdt nooit op. Traditiegetrouw volgt Voetbal International de buitenlandse markt op de voet. Bekijk hier ons blog voor de transferperikelen in Nederland.

items.title: De Zerbi ontslagen bij Marseille: De Lange en Timber krijgen nieuwe trainer
items.summary: Olympique Marseille heeft dinsdagnacht bekendgemaakt dat Roberto De Zerbi vertrekt bij de Franse topclub. De huidige nummer vier in de Ligue 1 houdt de Italiaan verantwoordelijk voor de wisselvallige resultaten.

items.title: Tijdperk Kroes is voorbij: alle Ajax-aankopen langs de meetlat
items.summary: Het veelbewogen tijdperk van Alex Kroes bij Ajax zit erop. Door allerlei omstandigheden is zijn termijn officieel beperkt gebleven tot een kleine twee jaar, Jordi Cruijff heeft zijn functie nu overgenomen. Als technisch directeur had Kroes een omvangrijk takenpakket, met het transferbeleid voor Ajax 1 als meest in het oog springende onderdeel. Tijd om de balans op te maken.

items.title: West Ham expose the limitations of Michael Carrick's Man United squad
items.summary: A point on the road isn't a bad result, especially after four wins in a row, but Tuesday's draw with West Ham has shown that Manchester United still have issues breaking down a packed defense.

items.title: Has time run out for Frank? Spurs' latest loss puts him in unprecedented danger
items.summary: After Tottenham's 2-1 loss to Newcastle, it's fair to wonder how long they can continue with Thomas Frank.

items.title: Carrick hails 'unbelievable' Sesko goal to earn draw
items.summary: Michael Carrick hailed super-sub Benjamin Sesko's "unbelievable finish" after the striker's amazing last-gasp volley snatched Manchester United a 1-1 draw at West Ham United.

items.title: Frank 'convinced' of Spurs stay amid Poch chants
items.summary: Tottenham head coach Thomas Frank said he is "convinced" he will remain in charge for the north London derby against Arsenal despite Spurs fans calling for him to be sacked.

items.title: Sources: De Zerbi to exit Marseille after PSG rout
items.summary: Roberto De Zerbi and Marseille have agreed to the departure of the Italian head coach by mutual consent after a series of damaging defeats, sources told ESPN.

items.title: Carrick's 'Sir Alex' playbook and a happy start at Man Utd
items.summary: Michael Carrick is happy with his start as Manchester United head coach despite dropping his first points in 1-1 draw at West Ham.

items.title: McIlroy calls on Europe to cut down crowd abuse at 2027 Ryder Cup
items.summary: Rory McIlroy does not want a repeat of the abuse which surrounded him during Europe's Ryder Cup victory over the United States at Bethpage Black when the 2027 tournament arrives in Ireland.

items.title: Frank insists he is safe - but will he avoid Spurs sack?
items.summary: Tottenham manager Thomas Frank insists his job is not under threat despite dropping to five points from the Premier League relegation zone - but will the Dane avoid the sack?

items.title: Man Utd latest: Should Sesko start matches now? He's ready, says Carrick
Scottish Premiership: Late winner for Hearts in tense Edinburgh derby
items.summary: Tomas Magnusson scores in 88th minute to seal win Jambos now have a six-point lead at the top of the table Tomas Magnusson scored a late winner as the Scottish Premiership leaders Hearts defeated Hibernian 1-0 in a tense Edinburgh derby to tighten their grip on top spot. Magnusson, on as a substitute, popped up with the game’s decisive moment in the 88th minute to spark jubilant scenes inside Tynecastle. Continue reading...

items.title: 'No win, no trim' - has a haircut become a problem for Man Utd?
items.summary: A story about a haircut that has gone viral - meet Frank Ilett, the Manchester United fan with the infamous bouffant.

items.title: Sesko rescues late point for Manchester United to deny West Ham precious win
items.summary: Stop all the clippers, don’t cut off the barnet: United’s winning run is over. Frank Ilett, the man who pledged never to visit a barber again until Manchester United won five matches in a row, may have been denied a viral haircut, but United’s resilience came to the fore here to deny the Hammers what would have been a deserved victory deep into added time. A studded finish from the fan favourite Tomas Soucek was cancelled out by an impressive, instinctive strike from Benjamin Sesko to leave this match honours even. United lacked energy and snap, West Ham saw two precious points fall away at the last; both sides will leave frustrated but not disconsolate. The Hammers remain in 18th place, United stay in fourth, their contrasting objectives remain in play. Continue reading...

items.title: Villa plotting Gibbs-White move - Wednesday's gossip
items.summary: Aston Villa are plotting a move for Morgan Gibbs-White, Liverpool's Mohamed Salah is a target for one of the Saudi Pro League's top clubs, Sandro Tonali's wages could be an obstacle for Serie A clubs, plus more.
